--- Thread (50 messages, 2018-04-17) ---
[2018-04-17 22:28] kaiasky (kaia): A weird rhino thing:
Reconstitution Plant (3 :Gold: :Green: supply 4) 3 :Fragile:
:Click: pay :Energy: and sacrifice a rhino with Stamina 0 to construct a prompt rhino.

The basic idea being that for 13GRR you can have two steelsplitters, but also essentially a flat extra 2 block because you can click a rhino and reconstitute it on the same turn. Plus, faster to get up and running but in the late game, running out of E means you can't attack with them for long
[2018-04-17 22:35] kaiasky (kaia): One issue I have with it right now is it sorta causes a dominance rule violation, because there are cases where you might want to have a 0 stamina rhino rather than a 1 stamina rhino so you can reconstitute
[2018-04-17 22:36] kaiasky (kaia): But letting the player click which rhino they want seems annoying and I can't find a good way to say like "a 0 stamina rhino or a 1 stamina rhino if no 0 stamina rhinos exist or a 2.." etc that feels prismata-y
[2018-04-17 22:42] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Breaks SDR, but fine.
[2018-04-17 22:45] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It's weak, you want to Click on the last Attack turn.
[2018-04-17 22:45] kaiasky (kaia): I'm confused on that last message?
[2018-04-17 22:47] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Also, it's more Parasitic than Synergy.
[2018-04-17 22:48] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): And shouldn't it have Red?
[2018-04-17 22:49] f300xen (f0x): ignore SSP's feedback
[2018-04-17 22:50] kaiasky (kaia): Yeah I thought about giving it red, ultimately I just chose green because the image in my mind was that it was like "changing the battery" on a rhino and green feels like a weird energy source even though I know rhino's aren't powered by it because they aren't green
[2018-04-17 22:50] 1000mh (Henry): Everyone is entitled to say their opinion on units and game design in this channel. Don't belittle others.
[2018-04-17 22:50] kaiasky (kaia): It was an arbitrary call
[2018-04-17 22:50] kaiasky (kaia): I'm not sure why you say it's parasitic, it allows rhinos to keep attacking after their normal two click limit.
[2018-04-17 22:51] darkeisbein: the unit is really weird and I don't quite know what to make of it
[2018-04-17 22:51] f300xen (f0x): saying it's parasitic is like saying resophore is parasitic
[2018-04-17 22:51] 1000mh (Henry): I've seen a few designs where they instead "recharge" a Rhino by adding 1 or 2 charges back to it. What made you decide to go with sacrifice instead of the recharge idea?
[2018-04-17 22:51] darkeisbein: having synergies with base set is a good place to have synergies cause they are relevant every game
[2018-04-17 22:51] 1000mh (Henry): @f0x Thats better, thanks
[2018-04-17 22:52] kaiasky (kaia): Recharge isn't an existing keyword, right?
[2018-04-17 22:52] kaiasky (kaia): I just wanted to implement the same idea without adding a keyword
[2018-04-17 22:52] darkeisbein: I like the sacrifice solution
[2018-04-17 22:52] 1000mh (Henry): It is not a keyword, no
[2018-04-17 22:53] darkeisbein: I think it could just say sacrifice a rhino
[2018-04-17 22:53] darkeisbein: and just automatically sacrifice the weakest rhino
[2018-04-17 22:53] darkeisbein: that way it doesn't violate SDR
[2018-04-17 22:53] kaiasky (kaia): Yeah that's a good call
[2018-04-17 22:53] darkeisbein: well it kinda get's into weird ordering issues I guess
[2018-04-17 22:54] darkeisbein: sacrificed units get clicked automatically
[2018-04-17 22:55] darkeisbein: or no it actually does
[2018-04-17 22:55] darkeisbein: cause if you have a 1 stamina rhino and a 0 stamina rhino lying around
[2018-04-17 22:56] darkeisbein: you might want to click the 1 stamina rhino and then sac it
[2018-04-17 22:56] darkeisbein: or you might want to sac the 0 stamina rhino and keep the 1 stamina rhino
[2018-04-17 22:56] darkeisbein: the first is better if you want to sac the rhino on defense anyways
[2018-04-17 22:56] kaiasky (kaia): Isn't that the same as clicking the 1 stamina and sacrificing either of the now-0 stamina?
[2018-04-17 22:56] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Galvani Biofield is good.
[2018-04-17 22:57] darkeisbein: the first option gives you 1 attack and 2 stamina and a 0 stamina rhino
[2018-04-17 22:57] darkeisbein: the second option gives you 0 attack, a 2 stamina and a 1 stamina rhino
[2018-04-17 22:57] kaiasky (kaia): Sorry yeah I agree with that
[2018-04-17 22:58] tophwells (Toph): why the :Energy: cost in the click ability?
[2018-04-17 22:58] 1000mh (Henry): You are "recharging" it c:
[2018-04-17 22:58] 1000mh (Henry): Or as Keon put it, "changing the battery"
[2018-04-17 22:58] tophwells (Toph): plug your rhino into the power socket
[2018-04-17 22:58] darkeisbein: correct rhino battery staple :^)
[2018-04-17 22:59] tophwells (Toph): How do you stop a rhino from charging? Destroy your opponent's Engineer.
[2018-04-17 22:59] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): I made something like this before.
[2018-04-17 23:01] kaiasky (kaia): StrShPlyr If you can find it I'd love to see it, I think there's a lot of interesting possibilities with rhino synergy c:
[2018-04-17 23:01] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Resting Dynamo (1.1)
[2018-04-17 23:02] tophwells (Toph): Cost-wise, very interesting. Under ideal situations it's effectively producing 2 attack per turn. But you need exhausted Rhinos to activate it, so it's way cheaper than a plain 2-attacker would be.
[2018-04-17 23:02] kaiasky (kaia): "sacrifice the rhino with the least remaining stamina" or something to fix the problem you talked about darkisbein? I don't think there's any situation where you'd want to sacrifice a 1-stamina over a 0stamina, right?
[2018-04-17 23:03] tophwells (Toph): sacrificing a 1-stamina allows you to produce 1 attack this turn
